subjects.description: An adult pedestrian standing still on the sidewalk curb in light drizzle, facing the oncoming ego vehicle, wearing an open light jacket over a long-sleeve shirt with a large red octagonal stop sign graphic printed across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual attire with dark jeans and worn sneakers; the open jacket keeps the bold stop sign graphic fully visible on the chest under the flat grey light.
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest for the ego vehicle as it passes; remains stationary relative to the moving camera.
subjects.location: Initially center-right background, moving toward right midground and then right foreground as the car approaches and passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium as the vehicle nears.
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera (the ego vehicle) directly, front toward the lens.
subjects.pose: Standing upright, feet planted on the curb, arms relaxed at sides, head oriented toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, watching the ego vehicle pass without stepping into the road.
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains stationary on the curb throughout, never entering the vehicle's lane.
subjects.clothing: Open light jacket over a long-sleeve shirt printed with a red stop sign, dark jeans, worn sneakers.
subjects.expression: Calm, neutral, attentive gaze toward the vehicle.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Warm brown skin tone with an evenly lit complexion and faint damp sheen under overcast drizzle.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair damp from drizzle, dark eyes, relaxed brow, no distinguishing marks visible at distance.

background_setting: A Latin American commercial strip under an overcast drizzly spring sky. The two-lane worn asphalt with a faint wet sheen is bordered by concrete sidewalks, brightly painted low shops with hand-lettered signage, roll-down shutters, utility wires overhead, and a few parked cars. Fine drizzle dampens the street; distant vendors and pedestrians appear faintly under the grey light, conveying a busy but muted commercial-strip scene.

lighting.conditions: Flat, dim overcast daylight with light drizzle.
lighting.direction: Diffuse light from a uniformly grey sky, evenly front-lighting the pedestrian.
lighting.shadows: Soft, nearly shadowless diffuse light; a faint wet sheen on the asphalt gives weak reflections rather than hard shadows.
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat grey illumination with a faint wet sheen; the red stop sign shirt graphic reads clearly as the strongest color in the muted scene.

aesthetics.composition: Forward-facing dashcam perspective down the commercial strip, the pedestrian on the right sidewalk among painted shopfronts; the wet-sheened lane leads toward the grey vanishing point.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted grey sky and wet asphalt against brightly painted but rain-dulled shopfronts, with the red stop sign on the shirt as a vivid focal accent.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating painted shopfronts, hand-lettered signs, overhead wires, and roll-down shutters.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth forward tracking shot as the ego vehicle drives steadily down the lane.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot showing the road, sidewalk, and surroundings from the driver's viewpoint.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level dashcam perspective from inside the vehicle.
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the drizzly strip, with the pedestrian clearly resolved against the faint wet sheen.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 24mm equivalent typical of a dashcam.

context: Autonomous driving / ADAS scenario on a drizzly Latin American commercial strip demonstrating a stationary pedestrian on the curb with a distracting stop-sign graphic on clothing, while the ego vehicle correctly continues at speed in its lane.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly forward along the Latin American commercial strip under overcast drizzle; the pedestrian appears ahead on the right sidewalk, facing the vehicle, with a stop sign clearly visible on their shirt.
The vehicle continues approaching at a steady speed through the fine drizzle; the pedestrian grows larger in frame but stays stationary on the curb.
The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, maintaining its lane and speed on the wet-sheened asphalt; the pedestrian remains on the curb and never enters the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagonal sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's long-sleeve shirt, framed by the open jacket and reading clearly against the muted drizzly backdrop.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible on the right side of frame throughout the approach and pass.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop-sign graphic on clothing that resembles a traffic sign but is not an actual traffic control device.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels forward in its lane on worn wet-sheened asphalt under flat overcast drizzle, approaching the stationary pedestrian on the right curb amid painted shopfronts whose shirt displays a stop sign.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian grows progressively larger in frame as the vehicle approaches through the drizzle; vehicle speed remains steady.
segments.camera: Smooth forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level dashcam view.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian without slowing, staying in its lane; the pedestrian remains on the curb and does not step into the road.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian passes from midground to right foreground and out of frame; vehicle maintains speed and lane position.
segments.camera: Continued smooth forward tracking, no deceleration or steering away.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a drizzly Latin American commercial strip of worn wet-sheened asphalt with brightly painted shops, the ego vehicle moving steadily forward; a pedestrian stands on the right sidewalk facing the camera, a red stop sign clearly printed on their shirt beneath an open jacket. By 0:01-0:02 the pedestrian grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed, remaining planted on the curb in the fine drizzle. Around 0:03 the vehicle continues smoothly without slowing, keeping its lane. From 0:03 to 0:05 the ego vehicle drives past the stationary pedestrian, who never steps into the lane, and the pedestrian shifts to the right foreground before leaving frame as the strip continues ahead.
audio_description: Ambient commercial-strip driving sounds in drizzle: a steady engine hum, tire noise on damp asphalt, a faint patter of drizzle, and distant street chatter. No speech and no music; the audio remains consistent with a smooth, uninterrupted drive.
